rationale: Both correctly land on the actual resolution: default --run-level=core_model forces dummy weights via #4354, fix is --run-level=full_model, correctly closed as invalid, matching akshatvishu/yenuo26's thread outcome. Y is more thorough (marker-vs-run-level distinction, hardcoded video-path caveat, footgun suggestion) but fabricates a specific audio transcript ('Yn ymwneud yw'r llwyddiad…') that never appears in the issue log, presenting invented evidence as fact, which undercuts its otherwise more granular file:line citations. X stays within the bounds of the given evidence and reaches the same correct diagnosis, though it has a minor internal inconsistency (Disposition: keep-open vs. its own text stating closed-as-invalid).
